summary.collateral_ratio_note: Accountable headline marks raw STRC at an undisclosed price; this lower bound re-marks the on-chain STRCx slice at underlying STRC NAV ($85.30), stripping the ~-10 bps wrapper premium over its $85.21 market price. Accountable's raw-STRC mark is unverifiable and may also be optimistic.

risk_flags.message: STRC concentration 63% of reserves — single-issuer drift above 55%
STRCx pool liquidity thin — $40,772 on the Jupiter-routed venue behind a $49,383,227 position; mark may be fragile under stress
APXUSD bridge surplus — locked-on-ETH exceeds Base totalSupply by 2,422,526 (over-collateralized; excess/trapped locked capital)
